effect.content: someone with dermatomyositis / people with dermatomyositis; care team
effect.trigger: referring to people with dermatomyositis or the support network in patient materials

rule_text: In patient materials, say 'someone with dermatomyositis' / 'people with dermatomyositis' — not 'patients.' ('Patients' is acceptable only in HCP materials.) Use 'care team' (not 'staff') for the network of patients, HCPs, and support systems.
intent: Use person-first, inclusive language appropriate to patient/DTC audiences.
summary: In patient materials, use "someone/people with dermatomyositis" (not "patients"); use "care team" instead of "staff"; "patients" allowed only in HCP materials.
